reviews.review_description: Super fun really good physics but i think the npc shoud be able to die

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing! Expect an update soon, I’ve been working on it everyday for almost a year.

reviews.review_title: I want combat and guns and hand closing
reviews.review_description: I want more physics and combat and hand closing pls

reviews.review_title: Yet another edit and to the devs
reviews.review_description:
I just recently saw your edit on your comment and I just wanna say, keep working hard devs of physixlab, I believe you can do this update and you can work hard on it, you guys are goated for working on it so long. I believe in you, I really do.
:)

Edit: wow just you? I fell bad. You got this bro. You got this

developer_response.body:
Bringing a huge update to the game. Hoping to add a fully active ragdoll player, physics fingers, hand tracking option, etc!

Edit - I’ve been working on it everyday since I’ve commented, it’s coming soon :)

New Edit - Still been working on it almost everyday since, I am really close to finishing this massive update! It’s also just me, no other devs. That’s why it’s taking a bit of time.

reviews.review_description: This game could be good but like no Turning no guns from what I can see not a single line active npc. Take some stuff out of bonelabs book! Make it have combat and turning and stuff. Till then I’m not playing

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, huge update coming soon!
